turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, umm, I submitted my blood samples three days ago and still haven't gotten the report. Can you tell me what's going on?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I understand your concern. Could I get your name and the date of your test, please?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Rajan Iyer. I gave the sample on Monday, 12th.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you, Mr. Iyer. I'm sorry, but I'm not able to access the laboratory status system or retrieve individual test results from here. I wouldn't want to give you incorrect information about something this important. Let me connect you to our laboratory staff who can give you the exact status. Please hold for a moment.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Transferring you now — our lab team will be able to help you right away. Thank you for your patience.
